items.name: RAVEL-VB-beachvolleyball-tracking
items.description: • RAVEL-VB is a compact OpenVINO-powered model for detecting and tracking players and the ball in volleyball videos. It uses dynamic region proposals, temporal association, and persistent region vectors, providing standalone CPU inference, JSON predictions, and annotated video rendering.
